newClaims.quote:
Biomedical research training
Ph.D. and master's degrees in biomedical sciences
newClaims.claimText: College offers biomedical research training including Ph.D. and master's degrees in biomedical sciences.
newClaims.limitations: System/college-level scope; not Florida-campus attributed in this quote.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured visiting clerkships and GME but skipped the biomedical research training program section listed in the same Academic programs index.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Pre-residency research training (Ph.D./master's biomedical) is Tier 1 research family.

newClaims.claimText: College Admissions section lists 'Visiting medical student clerkships' as a discrete admissions pathway entry.
newClaims.limitations: No URL, fee, deadline, or eligibility stated in this quote.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1's visiting-student quote came from the Academic programs blurb; the separate Admissions-section listing was not captured.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Visiting medical student admissions pathway is Tier 1 USCE-match.

newClaims.quote: Carleigh Eagle's path to Mayo Clinic began not in an engineering lab or medical school classroom, but as an intern in the Clinical Research Internship Study Program (CRISP).
newClaims.claimText: Page references the Clinical Research Internship Study Program (CRISP), a named research internship at Mayo Clinic.
newClaims.limitations: Mentioned in a news blurb; eligibility, audience, and campus not stated.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not scan the news/highlights section where CRISP is named.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Clinical research internship is Tier 1 research family.

newClaims.quote: Residencies and fellowshipsAdmissions • Stipend and benefits
newClaims.claimText: Residencies and fellowships admissions section explicitly advertises stipend and benefits.
newClaims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured only the 350+ GME headline; the Admissions-section 'Stipend and benefits' line is a distinct trainee-financial signal.
newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Trainee stipend/benefits is Tier 2 trainee content.

newClaims.quote: Mayo Clinic School of Graduate Medical Education
newClaims.claimText: Mayo Clinic operates a named 'Mayo Clinic School of Graduate Medical Education' as one of its five schools.

newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Named GME school is Tier 2 trainee education.

newClaims.tierAssignmentRationale: Job openings link is Tier 3 practice/career signal.
